name: Berlin Bread from Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the eggs and water until frothy. Gradually add sugar, whisking continuously until the mixture is thick and creamy.
2. Sift together flour and baking powder. Combine with eggs, then gradually mix in apple preserves, flavorings, spices, nuts, and candied peel.
3. Pour the batter onto a greased baking sheet, spreading it to about 1/4 inch thickness. Preheat oven for 5 minutes at very hot settings. Bake at moderate heat (375F) for 15-20 minutes.
4. Prepare icing with confectioners sugar and hot water or milk. Apply while the bread is still warm and cut into slices measuring approximately 1 x 2 inches.
